title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・暴虐女王！

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
How do ya like that, Scarlet? Looks like I beat ya!
Guess that means I'm the queen.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, I guess you are... Well, would you look at
the time!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now hold on just a second! We promised, didn't
we? The loser's gotta do whatever the queen says.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... How humiliating. I can't believe this is
happening...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer. We can command her to do
anythin' we want. Gimme somethin' awesome.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After giving it a lot of thought, I come up with...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You want me to do what?! F-fine...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You really are something, Trainer. I never
imagined the two of you would best me in the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You must be some kind of genius. I can't help
but... look up to you...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: There! Is that good enough for you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All riiight, my turn! Now, what should I choose?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's hear you say, "Vodka, you're the real
number one! I'm just a low-level chump who
doesn't even deserve second."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wh-what the heck is that?! Grrrrr...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: V-Vodka... you're the real... n-number one...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're a real pain in my butt, that's what! I can't
think of anyone who gets on my nerves more!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What the heck was that?! That's not what we
promised!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the crowd still watching them, the two
keep on bickering, lost in their own world.
